rulings.Case Title: OTIS GLOVER et al VS. CERTAINTEED CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Pacific Bell Telephone Company To Produce Its Person(S) Most Knowledgeable, Custodian(S) Of Records And Responsive Documents At Deposition And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Tuesday, February 4, 2014 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel Pacific Bell Telephone Company to produce its person(s) most knowledgeable, custodian(s) of records and responsive documents at deposition and request for sanctions is continued to February 10, 2014 per agreement of the parties. = (503/TLJ)
